title: JDBC throws unexpected connection close when commit/rollback after timeout
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
INSERT INTO t2 (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', NULL);
UPDATE t2 SET age = age + 1 WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM t2 WHERE name IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE age > (SELECT AVG(age) FROM t2);
key_bug_features: commit/rollback after timeout causes connection close
